inputs.label: Radius
inputs.businessContext: The radius of the circle from which the segment is taken.

businessContext_i18n.en: The radius of the circle from which the segment is taken.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Radius des Kreises, aus dem das Segment entnommen wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le rayon du cercle dont est issu le segment.
businessContext_i18n.es: El radio del círculo del cual se toma el segmento.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نصف قطر الدائرة التي يُؤخذ منها القطاع.

inputs.label: Central Angle
inputs.businessContext: The central angle of the segment in degrees.

businessContext_i18n.en: The central angle of the segment in degrees.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Mittelpunktswinkel des Segments in Grad.
businessContext_i18n.fr: L'angle au centre du segment en degrés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo central del segmento en grados.

inputs.label: Scale Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor to account for safety or overage, e.g., 1.1 for 10% extra.

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor to account for safety or overage, e.g., 1.1 for 10% extra.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güvenlik veya fire payı faktörü, örn. %10 fazla için 1.1.
businessContext_i18n.de: Faktor zur Berücksichtigung von Sicherheit oder Überbestand, z. B. 1,1 für 10 % Extra.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de sécurité ou de marge, par exemple 1,1 pour 10 % de supplément.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor para considerar seguridad o excedente, ej. 1.1 para 10% extra.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل لمراعاة السلامة أو الزيادة، مثلاً 1.1 لزيادة 10%.

inputs.label: Number of Segments
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical segments to calculate total area.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical segments to calculate total area.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam alanı hesaplamak için özdeş segment sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl identischer Segmente zur Berechnung der Gesamtfläche.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de segments identiques pour calculer la surface totale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de segmentos idénticos para calcular el área total.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد القطاعات المتطابقة لحساب المساحة الكلية.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
